theme_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Modified for Trust/Utility: Trust Blue & Soft White)
theme_archetype.rationale: Elderly-friendly app for the German market. Needs high trust, clinical clarity, and calmness. Blue and white provides safety and clarity without being overly playful or confusing.

spacing_and_layout.mobile_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-50 shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden flex flex-col relative

components.button_primary: h-14 w-full rounded-2xl bg-blue-700 text-white text-lg font-bold hover:bg-blue-800 transition-colors shadow-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-3
components.button_secondary: h-14 w-full rounded-2xl bg-white text-blue-700 border-2 border-slate-200 text-lg font-bold hover:border-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-3
components.card: bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-slate-100 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-4
components.badge: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-bold border

onboarding_secure.description: 3D clay illustration of a secure document folder with a shield.

onboarding_translate.description: 3D clay illustration of a checkmark over a translated document.

onboarding_scan.description: 3D clay illustration of a camera scanning a generic paper document.

icons.style: Use clear, recognizable icons. Ensure stroke width is 2 or 2.5 for better visibility for elderly users. Common icons: Shield, Camera, FileText, CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, AlertCircle, Home, Clock, Settings, ChevronRight.

instructions_to_main_agent: Simulate mobile-first app on web: restrict layout to 'max-w-md mx-auto'.
Use minimum 14pt (ideally text-lg) for body text for high readability.
Do not use transparent overlays that decrease readability.
Follow WCAG AA standards: keep text contrast very high.
Every button and interactive element must have large touch targets (h-14).
Make the Multi-stage loading screen feel calm and systematic, reducing user anxiety.
critical_rules: Always wrap interactive elements in testing attributes (e.g., data-testid="scan-button").
Use Manrope for Headings, IBM Plex Sans for body text.
No complex gradients. Keep surfaces flat, solid, and accessible.
Risk level cards MUST use the status color tokens (green, yellow, red).
